headline: Google is rolling out its redesigned Workspace app icons
summary: Google Workspace apps are getting a visual refresh. New icons feature a modern gradient design. The rollout began this morning for users.

headline: Sony is raising short-subscription prices for PlayStation Plus
summary: Sony is increasing prices for 1-month and 3-month PlayStation Plus. Price hikes affect 'select regions' starting May 20th. This is attributed to 'ongoing market conditions'.

headline: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are in a high-stakes legal battle over OpenAI's future. Musk sued OpenAI, alleging it abandoned its founding mission. The lawsuit claims OpenAI prioritized profit over humanity's benefit.

headline: Amazon Alexa Plus can now create AI-generated podcasts
summary: Alexa Plus, Amazon's AI assistant, now generates podcasts on virtually any topic. Users can give Alexa a topic and guide the AI hosts. This new feature was announced on Monday.

headline: Confused Retailers Receive Mysterious Shipments Containing One of the PS4's Rarest Games, Poop Slinger
summary: Retailers are receiving mysterious shipments of 'Poop Slinger'. It's one of the PS4's rarest games. Mom-and-pop stores are among those confused by the deliveries.

headline: This $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Is Just $375 During the Wayfair Memorial Day Sale
summary: A power lift recliner and massage chair is heavily discounted. Originally $1,800, it's now $375 during Wayfair's Memorial Day Sale. This offers a significant saving on a premium chair.

headline: Buy One Board Game or Puzzle, Get One 50% Off Through This Stellar Offer at Target
summary: Target is running a 'Buy One, Get One 50% Off' promotion. The deal applies to select board games, card games, and puzzles. This offer is valid until May 25th.

headline: Sony Announces PlayStation Plus Price Increases 'Due to Ongoing Market Conditions'
summary: Sony is raising prices for its PlayStation Plus subscription service. The company cites 'ongoing market conditions' as the reason. This news follows previous reports of similar price hikes.

headline: Married at First Sight UK brides tell BBC they were raped by on-screen husbands
summary: Married at First Sight UK brides allege they were raped by on-screen husbands. Channel 4 was aware of one claim before broadcast. The woman involved still featured in the show despite the claim.

headline: Burnham pledges not to 're-run' Brexit arguments
summary: Potential leadership challenger Burnham commits to not revisiting Brexit arguments. He states he does not propose the UK rejoin the EU. This comes amidst ongoing political discussions.

headline: Bodies of missing Italian divers found in Maldives
summary: All five Italian divers who went missing in the Maldives have been found. Officials confirmed their bodies were recovered last week. The incident led to a search and rescue operation.

headline: Prince William selling 20% of duchy property for housing and nature projects
summary: Prince William's Duchy of Cornwall plans to sell 20% of its estate. The sale aims to re-invest in new housing and nature projects. The estate covers 128,000 acres.
